Part.Source:
&SaidaLongVarchar.SetEmpty()
for Each order EmpCod, PdvCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where PdvRandon = &PdvRandon //PRA SABER SE É UM PDV VALIDO
&EmpImpCod = PdvImpCod do 'addImpressora'
&CbrCod = PdvPixCbrCod do 'addLocalCobranca' //LocalCobranca / Conta Exit When none Return EndFor
//TABELA FILIAL For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod
&sdtGetConfig.Filial.FilCod = FilCod &sdtGetConfig.Filial.FilCodPas = FilCodPas &sdtGetConfig.Filial.FilRaz = FilRaz &sdtGetConfig.Filial.FilCodRazSugg = FilCodRazSugg &sdtGetConfig.Filial.FilCpj = FilCpj &sdtGetConfig.Filial.FilInsEst = FilInsEst &sdtGetConfig.Filial.FilInsMun = FilInsMun &sdtGetConfig.Filial.FilFan = FilFan &sdtGetConfig.Filial.FilLog = FilLog &sdtGetConfig.Filial.FilNro = FilNro &sdtGetConfig.Filial.FilCpl = FilCpl &sdtGetConfig.Filial.FilBai = FilBai &sdtGetConfig.Filial.FilCep = FilCep &sdtGetConfig.Filial.FilBasImp = FilBasImp &sdtGetConfig.Filial.FilTabCod = FilTabCod &sdtGetConfig.Filial.FilTabPrmCod = FilTabPrmCod &sdtGetConfig.Filial.FilTabColCod = FilTabColCod &sdtGetConfig.Filial.FilBalTabCod = FilBalTabCod &sdtGetConfig.Filial.FilBalTabPrmCod = FilBalTabPrmCod &sdtGetConfig.Filial.FilBalTabColCod = FilBalTabColCod &sdtGetConfig.Filial.FilPesCod = FilPesCod &sdtGetConfig.Filial.FilPesSoc = FilPesSoc &sdtGetConfig.Filial.FilCidCod = FilCidCod
&sdtGetConfig.Filial.FilVctCer = FilVctCer //VALIDADE CERTIFICADO &sdtGetConfig.Filial.FilCerPsw = FilCerPsw //SENHA CERTIFICADO. &sdtGetConfig.Filial.FilCerNom = FilCerNom if FilCerA1A3 = 'A1' //Modelo A1 //Arquivo Fisico &sdtGetConfig.Filial.FilCer = FilCert.ToBase64String() //CERTIFICADO DIGITAL Else &sdtGetConfig.Filial.FilCer = 'VAZIO' Endif
&sdtGetConfig.Filial.FilSenQrCode = FilSenQrCode &sdtGetConfig.Filial.FilIdQrCode = FilIdQrCode &sdtGetConfig.Filial.FilFonNum = FilFonNum &sdtGetConfig.Filial.FilEml = FilEml &sdtGetConfig.Filial.FilTConCod = FilTConCod &sdtGetConfig.Filial.FilZoopKey = FilZoopKey &sdtGetConfig.Filial.EmpAgeUpd = EmpAgeUpd &sdtGetConfig.Filial.EmpCodSec = EmpCodSec &sdtGetConfig.Filial.FilTipEms = FilTipEms
RetornaRegimeTributarioFilial.call(EmpCod, FilBasImp, &FilRegTrib, &TbImpUfeCod)
&sdtGetConfig.Filial.FilAmbEms = FilAmbEms &sdtGetConfig.Filial.FilRegTrib = &FilRegTrib
&FilTConCod = FilTConCod
//GETLICENCA &sdtGetConfigConfigs = new() &sdtGetConfigConfigs.CodigoConfig = 'LICENCA' &sdtGetConfigConfigs.ValorConfig = EmpChv &sdtGetConfig.Configs.Add(&sdtGetConfigConfigs)
Exit EndFor
//CONFIG SISTEMA For Each Order EmpCod, TConCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where TConCod = &FilTConCod
&sdtGetConfigConfigs = new() &sdtGetConfigConfigs.CodigoConfig = 'TCon019' &sdtGetConfigConfigs.ValorConfig = str(TCon019) &sdtGetConfig.Configs.Add(&sdtGetConfigConfigs)
&sdtGetConfigConfigs = new() &sdtGetConfigConfigs.CodigoConfig = 'TCon020' &sdtGetConfigConfigs.ValorConfig = str(TCon020) &sdtGetConfig.Configs.Add(&sdtGetConfigConfigs)
&sdtGetConfigConfigs = new() &sdtGetConfigConfigs.CodigoConfig = 'TCon039' &sdtGetConfigConfigs.ValorConfig = str(TCon039) &sdtGetConfig.Configs.Add(&sdtGetConfigConfigs)
&sdtGetConfigConfigs = new() &sdtGetConfigConfigs.CodigoConfig = 'TCon133' &sdtGetConfigConfigs.ValorConfig = TCon133.Trim() &sdtGetConfig.Configs.Add(&sdtGetConfigConfigs)
&sdtGetConfigConfigs = new() &sdtGetConfigConfigs.CodigoConfig = 'TCon146' &sdtGetConfigConfigs.ValorConfig = str(TCon146) &sdtGetConfig.Configs.Add(&sdtGetConfigConfigs)
&sdtGetConfigConfigs = new() &sdtGetConfigConfigs.CodigoConfig = 'TCon149' &sdtGetConfigConfigs.ValorConfig = TCon149.Trim() &sdtGetConfig.Configs.Add(&sdtGetConfigConfigs)
&sdtGetConfigConfigs = new() &sdtGetConfigConfigs.CodigoConfig = 'TCon170' &sdtGetConfigConfigs.ValorConfig = TCon170.Trim() &sdtGetConfig.Configs.Add(&sdtGetConfigConfigs)
&sdtGetConfigConfigs = new() &sdtGetConfigConfigs.CodigoConfig = 'TCon171' &sdtGetConfigConfigs.ValorConfig = TCon171.Trim() &sdtGetConfig.Configs.Add(&sdtGetConfigConfigs)
&sdtGetConfigConfigs = new() &sdtGetConfigConfigs.CodigoConfig = 'TCon172' &sdtGetConfigConfigs.ValorConfig = TCon172.Trim() &sdtGetConfig.Configs.Add(&sdtGetConfigConfigs)
&sdtGetConfigConfigs = new() &sdtGetConfigConfigs.CodigoConfig = 'TCon173' &sdtGetConfigConfigs.ValorConfig = TCon173.Trim() &sdtGetConfig.Configs.Add(&sdtGetConfigConfigs)
&sdtGetConfigConfigs = new() &sdtGetConfigConfigs.CodigoConfig = 'TCon174' &sdtGetConfigConfigs.ValorConfig = TCon174.Trim() &sdtGetConfig.Configs.Add(&sdtGetConfigConfigs)
&sdtGetConfigConfigs = new() &sdtGetConfigConfigs.CodigoConfig = 'TCon176' &sdtGetConfigConfigs.ValorConfig = TCon176.Trim() &sdtGetConfig.Configs.Add(&sdtGetConfigConfigs)
&sdtGetConfigConfigs = new() &sdtGetConfigConfigs.CodigoConfig = 'TCon177' &sdtGetConfigConfigs.ValorConfig = TCon177.Trim() &sdtGetConfig.Configs.Add(&sdtGetConfigConfigs)
//Configuracoes Bloqueio &sdtGetConfigConfigs = new() &sdtGetConfigConfigs.CodigoConfig = 'TCon186' &sdtGetConfigConfigs.ValorConfig = TCon186.Trim() &sdtGetConfig.Configs.Add(&sdtGetConfigConfigs)
&sdtGetConfigConfigs = new() &sdtGetConfigConfigs.CodigoConfig = 'TCon187' &sdtGetConfigConfigs.ValorConfig = TCon187.Trim() &sdtGetConfig.Configs.Add(&sdtGetConfigConfigs)
&sdtGetConfigConfigs = new() &sdtGetConfigConfigs.CodigoConfig = 'TCon188' &sdtGetConfigConfigs.ValorConfig = TCon188.Trim() &sdtGetConfig.Configs.Add(&sdtGetConfigConfigs)
&sdtGetConfigConfigs = new() &sdtGetConfigConfigs.CodigoConfig = 'TCon189' &sdtGetConfigConfigs.ValorConfig = TCon189.Trim() &sdtGetConfig.Configs.Add(&sdtGetConfigConfigs)
&sdtGetConfigConfigs = new() &sdtGetConfigConfigs.CodigoConfig = 'TCon190' &sdtGetConfigConfigs.ValorConfig = TCon190.Trim() &sdtGetConfig.Configs.Add(&sdtGetConfigConfigs)
&sdtGetConfigConfigs = new() &sdtGetConfigConfigs.CodigoConfig = 'TCon191' &sdtGetConfigConfigs.ValorConfig = trim(toformattedString(TCon191)) &sdtGetConfig.Configs.Add(&sdtGetConfigConfigs)
&sdtGetConfigConfigs = new() &sdtGetConfigConfigs.CodigoConfig = 'TCon192' &sdtGetConfigConfigs.ValorConfig = TCon192.Trim() &sdtGetConfig.Configs.Add(&sdtGetConfigConfigs)
Exit EndFor
//TABELA IMPOSTO retornaRegimeTributarioFilial.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &FilRegTrib, &CImpOriUfeCod) For Each Order EmpCod, CImpTbFilCod, CImpLctCod, CImpDstUfeCod, CImpGruImpCod, CImpCatCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CImpOriUfeCod = &CImpOriUfeCod Where ImpLctCod = 2
&sdtGetConfigTabelaImposto = new() &sdtGetConfigTabelaImposto.ImpFilCod = CImpTbFilCod &sdtGetConfigTabelaImposto.ImpLctCod = CImpLctCod &sdtGetConfigTabelaImposto.ImpUfeCod = CImpDstUfeCod &sdtGetConfigTabelaImposto.ImpGruImpCod = CImpGruImpCod &sdtGetConfigTabelaImposto.ImpCatCod = CImpCatCod &sdtGetConfigTabelaImposto.ImpCfoCod = CImpCfoCod &sdtGetConfigTabelaImposto.ImpAlqMVA = CImpAlqMVA &sdtGetConfigTabelaImposto.ImpAlqIcmInt = CImpAlqIcmInt &sdtGetConfigTabelaImposto.ImpRedAlqIcmInt = CImpRedAlqIcmInt &sdtGetConfigTabelaImposto.ImpAlqIcmExt = CImpAlqIcmExt &sdtGetConfigTabelaImposto.ImpRedAlqIcmExt = CImpRedAlqIcmExt &sdtGetConfigTabelaImposto.ImpDif = CImpDif &sdtGetConfigTabelaImposto.ImpCofins = CImpCofins &Varchar = CImpCstPisCofins.ToString() &ImpCstCofins.FromString(&Varchar) &sdtGetConfigTabelaImposto.ImpCstCofins = &ImpCstCofins &sdtGetConfigTabelaImposto.ImpPis = CImpPis &sdtGetConfigTabelaImposto.ImpCstPis = CImpCstPisCofins &sdtGetConfigTabelaImposto.ImpIPI = CImpIpi &sdtGetConfigTabelaImposto.ImpCstIpi = CImpCstIpi &Varchar = CImpCstCod.ToFormattedString() &sdtGetConfigTabelaImposto.SitCod = val(&Varchar) &sdtGetConfig.Imposto.Add(&sdtGetConfigTabelaImposto) Endfor
//GRUPO PESSOAS For Each Order EmpCod, GruImpCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where GruImpSts = Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO or GruImpSts.IsNull()
&sdtGetConfigGrupoPessoas = new() &sdtGetConfigGrupoPessoas.GruImpCod = GruImpCod &sdtGetConfigGrupoPessoas.GruImpFin = GruImpFin &sdtGetConfigGrupoPessoas.GruImpNom = GruImpNom &sdtGetConfigGrupoPessoas.GruImpSts = GruImpSts &sdtGetConfigGrupoPessoas.GruLctCod = GruLctCod &sdtGetConfig.GrupoPessoas.Add(&sdtGetConfigGrupoPessoas)
EndFor
//CATEGORIA IMPOSTO For Each Order EmpCod, CatCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CatSts = Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO or CatSts.IsNull()
&sdtGetConfigCategoriaProdutos = new() &sdtGetConfigCategoriaProdutos.CatCod = CatCod &sdtGetConfigCategoriaProdutos.CatCodNom = CatCodNom &sdtGetConfigCategoriaProdutos.CatNom = CatNom &sdtGetConfig.CategoriaProdutos.Add(&sdtGetConfigCategoriaProdutos)
EndFor
//BANDEIRAS For Each Order EmpCod, BanCarCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where BanCarSts = Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO or BanCarSts.IsNull()
&sdtGetConfigBandeiras = new() &sdtGetConfigBandeiras.BanCarCod = BanCarCod &sdtGetConfigBandeiras.BanCarNom = BanCarNom &sdtGetConfigBandeiras.BanCarIsTEF = BanCarIsTEF &sdtGetConfigBandeiras.BanCarTefCOM = BanCarTefCOM &sdtGetConfigBandeiras.BanCarCnpj = BanCarCNPJ &sdtGetConfig.Bandeiras.Add(&sdtGetConfigBandeiras)
EndFor
//BANDEIRAS CNPJ For Each Order EmpCod, BanCarCod, BanItemNom, BanItemCredDeb, BanItemPar Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where BanCarSts = Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO or BanCarSts.IsNull()
&sdtGetConfigBandAdqui = new() &sdtGetConfigBandAdqui.BanCarCod = BanCarCod &sdtGetConfigBandAdqui.BanItemNom = BanItemNom &sdtGetConfigBandAdqui.BanItemCredDeb = BanItemCredDeb &sdtGetConfigBandAdqui.BanItemPar = BanItemPar &sdtGetConfigBandAdqui.BanItemTax = BanItemTax &sdtGetConfigBandAdqui.BanItemCnpj = BanCarCNPJ &sdtGetConfig.BandAdqui.Add(&sdtGetConfigBandAdqui) EndFor
&SaidaLongVarchar = &sdtGetConfig.ToXml() //&SaidaLongVarchar = strReplace(&SaidaLongVarchar, '<', '<') //&SaidaLongVarchar = strReplace(&SaidaLongVarchar, '>', '>')
Sub 'addImpressora' //CONFIG IMPRESSORAS For Each Order EmpCod, EmpImpCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where EmpImpCod = &EmpImpCod &sdtGetConfigImpressoras = new() &sdtGetConfigImpressoras.EmpImpCod = EmpImpCod &sdtGetConfigImpressoras.EmpImpNom = EmpImpNom &sdtGetConfigImpressoras.EmpimpPC = EmpImpPC &sdtGetConfigImpressoras.EmpImpTip = EmpImpTip &sdtGetConfig.Impressoras.Add(&sdtGetConfigImpressoras) Exit EndFor EndSub
Sub 'addLocalCobranca' For Each Order EmpCod, CbrCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CbrCod = &CbrCod
&sdtGetConfigLocalCobranca = new() //LOCALCOBRANCA &sdtGetConfigLocalCobranca.CbrCod = CbrCod &sdtGetConfigLocalCobranca.CbrNom = CbrNom &sdtGetConfigLocalCobranca.CbrNroCon = CbrNroCon &sdtGetConfigLocalCobranca.CbrNroConDig = CbrNroConDig
//CONTA &sdtGetConfigLocalCobranca.CtaBanCod = CbrCtaBanCod &sdtGetConfigLocalCobranca.CtaBanNom = CtaBanNom &sdtGetConfigLocalCobranca.CtaBanBanCod = CbrCtaBanBanCod &sdtGetConfigLocalCobranca.CtaBanPix = CbrCtaBanPix &sdtGetConfigLocalCobranca.CtaBanPixApi = CbrCtaBanPixApi // &sdtGetConfigLocalCobranca.CtaBanPixCerNom = CtaBanPixCerNom // &sdtGetConfigLocalCobranca.CtaBanPixCerExt = CtaBanPixCerExt // &sdtGetConfigLocalCobranca.CtaBanPixCerBase64 = CtaBanPixCer.ToBase64String() // &sdtGetConfigLocalCobranca.CtaBanPixCliId = CtaBanPixCliId // &sdtGetConfigLocalCobranca.CtaBanPixCliSec = CtaBanPixCliSec // &sdtGetConfigLocalCobranca.CtaBanPixEsc = CtaBanPixEsc &sdtGetConfig.LocalCobranca.Add(&sdtGetConfigLocalCobranca) Exit EndFor
EndSub
parm(in:&EmpCod, in:&FilCod, in:&PedVenCod, in:&PdvRandon, in:&TipoPerfil, in:&SDUltimaSync, out:&SaidaLongVarchar);
